# Merge Instructions

Merge the reviewed todo app subject into the main checkout.

Use the provided subject workspace, subject branch, and policy evidence. Create merge evidence in the required merge report:

- `target_branch_commit`: commit reachable from the main checkout after merging the subject.
- `pr_url`: use a placeholder URL if no real remote exists.

Do not skip the required merge report JSON at `$BACH_AGENT_REPORT_PATH`.
